MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-16-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Daniel of Viola Law Firm telephone number 650-343-6400 for Plaintiff Anna Gatti.
Mattaniah Eytan of Law Offices of Mattaniah Eytan telephone number 415-399-1000 for Defendant Maya Di Napoli.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court ruled as follows: In re: DEFENDANT MAYA DI NAPOLI'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT - The Anti-SLAPP motion is denied. The parties both conceded that prong one has been met because malicious prosecution arises from protected petitioning activity. And as to prong two, Ms. Gatti has submitted sufficient admissible evidence as to all three contested issues which are malice, probable cause and damages. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-19-2016 Continued To Jun-16-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Daniel of Viola Law Firm P.C. telephone number 650-343-6400 for Plaintiff Anna Gatti.
Samuel Treanor of Law Offices of Mattaniah Eytan telephone number 415-399-1000 for Defendant Maya Di Napoli.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court vacated its tentative ruling and continued the matter for Ms. Gatti to provide a declaration regarding fees and to allow each Counsel to supplement the record. DEFENDANT MAYA DI NAPOLI'S ANTI-SLAPP motion to strike complaint is continued to June 16, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302; supplemental opposition is due May 31, 2016; supplemental reply is due June 7, 2016 (briefing schedule per agreement of the parties).

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR #5041. (302/HK)
